title: post api v1 update dock with valid payload
description: Test the POST /api/v1/update-dock endpoint with a valid JSON payload containing dock_id, progress, safety_issue, current_task, and timestamp. Verify that the response status is 200 OK, the response body confirms the CSV file update, and the updated_record_count is correct.

title: post api v1 update dock with missing required fields
description: Test the POST /api/v1/update-dock endpoint with a JSON payload missing required fields such as progress. Verify that the response status is 400 Bad Request and the response body contains validation error details. Confirm that the dock record remains unchanged by fetching it via GET /api/v1/dashboard-status.

title: get api v1 dashboard status after dock update
description: After a successful dock update via POST /api/v1/update-dock, test the GET /api/v1/dashboard-status endpoint with the dock_id parameter. Verify that the response status is 200 OK and the JSON response contains the newly updated dock record.

title: get dashboard html reflects updated dock data
description: After updating dock data via POST /api/v1/update-dock, test the GET /dashboard endpoint. Verify that the response status is 200 OK and the HTML body contains updated metrics and a recent generation timestamp reflecting the latest dock data.

title: get dashboard generation failure and error logs
description: Simulate a dashboard generation failure after POST /api/v1/update-dock. Test GET /dashboard to receive a 500 Internal Server Error with a generation failure page. Then test GET /api/v1/logs?source=dashboard-generate to verify that JSON log entries describe the generation error.

title: get api v1 analytics with valid dock id
description: Test the GET /api/v1/analytics endpoint with a valid dock_id parameter. Verify that the response status is 200 OK and the JSON response contains dock_id, d_day prediction, daily_rate, risk_level, and recommendations.

title: get api v1 analytics explain with valid dock id
description: Test the GET /api/v1/analytics/explain endpoint with a valid dock_id parameter. Verify that the response status is 200 OK and the JSON response provides an explanation of model factors and rule-based decisions.

title: get api v1 analytics with unknown dock id
description: Test the GET /api/v1/analytics endpoint with an unknown dock_id parameter. Verify that the response status is 404 Not Found and the JSON response contains an error message indicating the dock was not found.

title: get api v1 export report with valid csv format and date
description: Test the GET /api/v1/export-report endpoint with format=csv and a valid since date parameter. Verify that the response status is 200 OK, the Content-Type is text/csv, and the CSV payload contains processed dock records. Confirm the client can save the file with the correct naming convention.

title: get api v1 export report with unsupported format
description: Test the GET /api/v1/export-report endpoint with an unsupported format parameter such as xml. Verify that the response status is 400 Bad Request and the JSON response contains an error message indicating unsupported format.
